title: bupleurum trichopodum var. dichotomum
intro: Bupleurum trichopodum var. dichotomum is a variant of the Bupleurum trichopodum plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its ability to tonify the Qi and alleviate liver and lung disorders. The health benefits of Bupleurum trichopodum var. dichotomum include its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immunomodulatory effects, which can help to reduce stress, improve mood, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum trichopodum var. dichotomum is often combined with other herbs such as safflower, licorice root, and schisandra, and is available in forms including capsules, tablets, and teas.
